untranslatable_reason: Mathold candlestick pattern requires multi-candle formation recognition (open-high-low-close sequences across multiple bars) which cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons. The pattern identification logic involves: (1) a small real body near the close, (2) a lower wick, (3) specific relationship to prior candles in a sequence. This requires custom pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal references a specific Japanese candlestick pattern requiring multi-bar analysis. The 78% success rate in bull markets and small sample size (fewer than 100 samples) are noted but cannot be encoded. A reasonable approximation using close position relative to SMA_20 is provided for exit, but the entry condition cannot be fully translated without pattern recognition capability.
